sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Home Depot stock trades near yearly highs as housing and Pro demand support earnings
feed.summary: Home Depot stock is trading near yearly highs, supported by resilient US home improvement demand, stable revenue, solid margins, and strong demand from professional customers and ongoing housing activity. The company's growth is driven by its interconnected retail strategy, disciplined capital allocation, and a diversified product mix that leverages both DIY and Pro customer segments. Investments in supply chain efficiency and technology further reinforce its competitive position and long-term value creation.

feed.title: DuPont stock trades steady as specialty materials earnings and guidance frame valuation
feed.summary: DuPont's stock is supported by its specialty materials portfolio, with recent earnings for fiscal 2025 showing net sales of around $8.4 billion and adjusted EPS above $3. The company's focus on Electronics & Industrial, Water & Protection, and other specialty lines, along with cost efficiencies, contributes to steady operating margins. While some segments showed growth, others experienced declines, and future guidance indicates a cautious but stable outlook for net sales and EPS, supported by ongoing efficiency programs and capital allocation strategies.

feed.title: PIFI ETF Profile: Dividends, Returns (BOATS:PIFI)
feed.summary: This article provides a detailed profile of the PIFI ETF, focusing on its dividends, returns, and fundamental details. It covers key statistics like assets under management, expense ratio, inception date, and investment strategy, highlighting its focus on US corporate and government debt. The article also addresses frequently asked questions about the fund's holdings, dividend history, and issuer.

feed.title: Comcast Declares Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: Comcast Corporation announced its Board of Directors declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.33 per share on the company’s common stock. This dividend is payable on October 28, 2026, to shareholders of record as of October 7, 2026. Comcast, a global media and technology company, provides various connectivity, entertainment, and experience services worldwide through its brands.

feed.title: CBS To Switch Affiliation From Nexstar To Hearst TV & Forum Communications Stations In A Half Dozen Markets
feed.summary: CBS will switch the affiliation of its stations in six markets from Nexstar to Hearst and Forum Communications, effective August 1. While CBS extended affiliations in 36 Nexstar markets, the six affected markets will see changes like Fox programming upgrades or The CW moving to main channels. Nexstar plans to expand local news content in some of these markets following the transitions.

feed.title: T-Mobile US, Inc. SEC Filing (Jul 23, 2026)
feed.summary: T-Mobile US, Inc. filed an IRANNOTICE with the SEC on July 23, 2026, pursuant to the Iran Threat Reduction and Syria Human Rights Act of 2012. This notice was included in its Quarterly Report on Form 10-Q for the quarter ended June 30, 2026. The filing indicates a neutral impact and sentiment according to AI-generated analysis.

feed.title: AMD Stock Gains Overnight: Analysts Laud Chipmaker's ‘Server Leadership’ After Strong Helios, Customer Updates
feed.summary: AMD stock gained overnight after its Advancing AI conference, where CEO Lisa Su projected the total computing market will expand to $2 trillion by 2030, with AI accelerators accounting for $1.4 trillion. Analysts like Jefferies raised price targets, citing AMD's server market leadership and strong product announcements, including the Helios rack-scale AI system. Retail sentiment on Stocktwits also shifted to "bullish" following the news.

feed.title: Corteva declares $0.18 quarterly dividend per share
feed.summary: Corteva Inc. (NYSE:CTVA) announced a quarterly common stock dividend of $0.18 per share, payable on September 15, 2026, to shareholders of record as of September 1, 2026. Additionally, the Board of Directors of EIDP Inc., a Corteva subsidiary, declared preferred stock dividends of $1.125 and $0.875 per share for its $4.50 and $3.50 series preferred stock, respectively, payable on October 23, 2026. Corteva is an agriculture company specializing in seed, crop protection, and digital products.

feed.title: KLA Corporation remains a Buy amid strong AI-driven semiconductor demand and solid margins.
feed.summary: KLA Corporation is maintained as a Buy due to sustained demand in the semiconductor sector driven by AI capital expenditure. The company's strong gross margins of approximately 61.75% and mid-teens revenue growth through 2027 support its medium-term valuation. Investors should focus on bookings, fab readiness, and China exposure, as market attention shifts to forward-looking guidance.

feed.title: Align Technology stock trades lower after softer Q1 2026 revenue and cautious outlook
feed.summary: Align Technology's stock fell after reporting softer-than-expected Q1 2026 revenue of $1.0 billion and a 17% decline in diluted earnings per share to $1.50, missing analyst consensus. The company issued a cautious full-year 2026 outlook, projecting mid-single-digit revenue growth and continued margin pressure, despite ongoing investment in its digital ecosystem and international expansion. Investors are concerned about macroeconomic headwinds, cautious consumer spending, and increased competition impacting demand for clear aligners and intraoral scanners.

feed.title: HPE Appoints Former Booking Holdings CFO David Goulden to Board of Directors
feed.summary: Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) has announced the appointment of David Goulden, former CFO of Booking Holdings Inc., to its board of directors. Goulden brings over 35 years of leadership experience in technology and finance, including senior roles at EMC Corporation and Dell Technologies. His expertise in corporate finance, M&A, and enterprise technology is expected to support HPE's strategic expansion in AI, cloud, and networking.

feed.title: LAMB WESTON HOLDINGS ($LW) Releases Q4 2026 Earnings
feed.summary: Lamb Weston Holdings ($LW) reported stronger-than-expected Q4 2026 earnings and revenue, beating analyst estimates. The company reported EPS of $0.87 against an estimate of $0.64 and revenue of $1.77 billion, exceeding the $1.74 billion estimate. The article also details recent insider trading activity, with multiple purchases, and institutional investor movements, showing both additions and reductions in holdings.

feed.title: Rothschild & Co Redburn Raises Price Target on Thermo Fisher Scientific to $625 From $610, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Rothschild & Co Redburn has increased its price target for Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc. (TMO) to $625 from $610, while reaffirming a Buy rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a continued positive outlook from the analyst firm on the scientific instrument and services company. Other financial institutions like RBC, Barclays, Bernstein, Goldman Sachs, and TD Cowen have also recently updated their price targets and ratings for Thermo Fisher Scientific.

feed.title: 3M Co (NYSE: MMM) EVP exercises options, then sells 7,880 shares
feed.summary: John Patrick Banovetz, Executive Vice President at 3M Company (NYSE: MMM), exercised non-qualified stock options for 7,880 shares at $154.69 per share, then immediately sold all 7,880 shares at $170.44 per share. This transaction resulted in an approximate pre-tax spread of $124,000, with gross sale proceeds around $1.34 million. The options exercised had an expiration date of February 6, 2027, and the filing indicated the transaction was not made under a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan.

feed.title: Citigroup Adjusts Price Target on Evergy to $97 From $95, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Citigroup has increased its price target for Evergy (EVRG) shares from $95 to $97, while maintaining its "Buy" rating on the utility company. This adjustment reflects a positive outlook on Evergy's financial prospects. The article also lists other recent analyst adjustments for Evergy from firms like BTIG, BMO Capital, Barclays, and Jefferies, indicating active analyst coverage for the stock.

feed.title: Evercore ISI Trims Price Target on Hartford Insurance to $145 From $146, Maintains In Line Rating
feed.summary: Evercore ISI has adjusted its price target for Hartford Insurance (HIG) to $145, down from $146, while maintaining an "In Line" rating. The update comes alongside news of Hartford's higher quarterly profit driven by strong insurance demand and investment income, as well as several recent analyst rating changes and dividend declarations. The company also announced a significant equity buyback plan and a new board appointment.

feed.title: DaVita stock trades steadily as recent quarterly earnings highlight stable dialysis demand
feed.summary: DaVita Inc. (NYSE: DVA) continues to demonstrate steady performance, supported by robust dialysis demand, strong financial metrics, and strategic share repurchases. The company's recent quarterly earnings show stable revenue growth in its kidney care business and improved earnings per share, driven by effective margin management. DaVita's defensive market position and consistent cash flow generation make it an attractive holding for investors in the US healthcare services sector.

feed.title: BiomX's Zorronet expands in Europe with AI coll...
feed.summary: BiomX's subsidiary Zorronet is expanding its AI-powered monitoring technology into Central and Eastern Europe through a partnership with Czech company Samura s.r.o. The collaboration will focus on smart pest management in agriculture and protecting critical transportation infrastructure using AI for early detection. This expansion aims to enhance safety, reduce costs, and improve operational efficiency in new commercial markets, with support from Samura for sales and Digital4Pest for technical assistance in the Czech and Slovakian markets.

feed.title: Form 4 Vertex Pharmaceuticals Inc For: 24 July By Investing.com
feed.summary: This article announces the filing of Form 4 by Vertex Pharmaceuticals Inc. on July 24. Form 4 is a document filed with the SEC by company insiders to report changes in their ownership of the company's stock. The article is brief and primarily serves as a notification of this event.

feed.title: Corteva declares $0.18 quarterly dividend per share By Investing.com
feed.summary: Corteva Inc. announced a quarterly common stock dividend of $0.18 per share, payable on September 15, 2026, to shareholders of record as of September 1, 2026. Additionally, its subsidiary, EIDP Inc., declared preferred stock dividends of $1.125 per share for the $4.50 series and $0.875 per share for the $3.50 series, payable on October 23, 2026. Corteva is an agriculture company focusing on seed, crop protection, and digital products.

feed.title: ETF Showdown: XBI vs PBE, Which Biotech Fund Wins?
feed.summary: This article compares two biotech ETFs, XBI and PBE, highlighting their differing investment strategies and performance. XBI, with its equal-weight spread across many biotech names, has shown stronger returns in recent bullish markets due to its higher beta. PBE, which screens for fundamentals and focuses on larger, profitable companies, offers more stability in volatile markets. Investors' choice depends on their risk tolerance and market outlook.

feed.title: Waters stock trades steady as recurring revenue and margins support valuation
feed.summary: Waters Corporation's stock is currently stable, supported by its increasing recurring revenue from service contracts, consumables, and software, along with resilient operating margins. The company's focus on essential analytical instruments for regulated pharmaceutical, industrial, and academic sectors provides a predictable cash flow, despite market uncertainties. Future performance is tied to its ability to manage competitive dynamics, regulatory changes, and technological shifts while maintaining strong growth, margins, and cash flow to justify its Nasdaq valuation.

feed.title: Dover sees recovery in plastics processing equipment demand
feed.summary: Dover Corporation is experiencing a recovery in the demand for plastics processing equipment, as reported by Plastics News. The company, which includes Maag Group a maker of auxiliary equipment, is seeing improved market conditions in this sector. The article, authored by Don Loepp, highlights this positive trend in late July 2026.

feed.title: Nordson stock trades steady as investors weigh strong fiscal 2024 growth and margin resilience
feed.summary: Nordson stock is trading steadily as investors analyze the company's strong fiscal 2024 performance, which includes double-digit revenue growth and higher earnings per share. The company demonstrated resilient margins and effective cost management despite a mixed macro environment. Nordson's focus on precision dispensing equipment, recurring consumables, and strategic capital allocation supports its valuation and long-term growth prospects.

feed.title: Novonix Director Sharan Burrow Increases Shareholding Through Share Purchase Plan Investment
feed.summary: Novonix Limited (NVX) director Sharan Burrow invested $5,000 to acquire an additional 31,250 ordinary shares through the company's Share Purchase Plan on July 22, 2026. This transaction increased her total ordinary shareholding from 215,739 to 246,989 shares, alongside 195,938 unchanged share rights. The acquisition demonstrates her confidence in the advanced battery materials and testing company, aligning director and shareholder interests while complying with ASX disclosure rules.

feed.title: State Street’s CEO Ronald O’Hanley sells $2.68m in stock.
feed.summary: State Street Corporation CEO Ronald P. O’Hanley sold 14,553 shares of company stock worth $2.68 million on July 21, 2026, pursuant to a pre-arranged trading plan. Despite his sale, the stock is considered undervalued by InvestingPro, and the company recently reported strong second-quarter earnings that surpassed analyst expectations, increasing revenue by 17% year-over-year. O'Hanley still directly holds over 240,000 shares and indirectly 70,327 shares.

feed.title: Thermo Fisher Raised Full-Year Guidance After a Standout Q2 Earnings Call
feed.summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific (TMO) reported strong Q2 2026 earnings, exceeding its own guidance with revenue of $11.99 billion and adjusted EPS of $6.03. This performance was largely driven by a recovery in the pharma and biotech sectors, leading management to raise full-year revenue guidance to $47.4 billion-$48.1 billion and adjusted EPS to $24.93-$25.33. TIKR's model now projects Thermo Fisher stock to reach $818 by late 2030, suggesting an 8% annualized return.

feed.title: Electronic Arts Inc. (EA) Shows Strong Momentum with RSI at 77
feed.summary: Electronic Arts Inc. (EA) is showing strong momentum with an RSI of 77, placing it in overbought territory. Despite a high GF Score™ of 90/100, indicating long-term potential, the stock's P/E ratio of 59.89x suggests a premium valuation, and there has been significant insider selling totaling $8.7 million over the past three months. Investors are advised to exercise caution due to these factors, particularly with upcoming earnings reports that could introduce volatility.

feed.title: 3m group president Goralski sells $835,577 in company stock
feed.summary: Christian T. Goralski Jr., Group President at 3M Co. (NYSE:MMM), sold 4,902 shares of the company's common stock for $835,577 on July 22, 2026, and simultaneously acquired the same number of shares through a stock option exercise. Following these transactions, Mr. Goralski holds 6,971.28 shares. The news comes after 3M reported strong second-quarter earnings, leading to increased price targets and positive outlooks from various analyst firms.

feed.title: Jefferies Adjusts Price Target on Huntington Bancshares to $18 From $19, Maintains Hold Rating
feed.summary: Jefferies has revised its price target for Huntington Bancshares (HBAN) to $18, down from $19, while reaffirming a Hold rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst other recent analyst activities for Huntington Bancshares, including Stephens adjusting its price target to $19, Baird to $21, and DA Davidson to $22. Morgan Stanley also recently downgraded Huntington Bancshares to Equalweight from Overweight.

feed.title: Lamb Weston declares $0.38 quarterly dividend By Investing.com
feed.summary: Lamb Weston Holdings, Inc. announced a quarterly dividend of $0.38 per share of common stock. The dividend will be paid on September 4, 2026, to shareholders of record as of August 7, 2026. Lamb Weston is a global supplier of frozen potato products.

feed.title: AMETEK stock rises on latest earnings and market data
feed.summary: AMETEK Inc.'s stock performance is analyzed based on its latest earnings report, focusing on revenue, operating profit, and margin trends. The article highlights the importance of the company's business mix between electronic instruments and electromechanical sectors, noting that operational execution and consistent growth are more significant drivers than short-term market headlines. Investors should primarily watch the company's reported fundamentals, segment performance, and guidance in future updates.

feed.title: Albemarle Appoints Former Vale CEO Eduardo Bartolomeo to Board of Directors
feed.summary: Albemarle Corp. has appointed Eduardo Bartolomeo, former CEO of Vale S.A., to its Board of Directors. Bartolomeo brings over three decades of experience in mining, metals, logistics, and industrial operations, which will be crucial as Albemarle navigates the evolving global demand for critical minerals and strengthens its strategic position. This appointment aims to enhance the company's governance and operational excellence amidst complex challenges in the battery materials market.

feed.title: TransDigm Group Incorporated Announces Appointment of Irina Krasik as Director, Effective July 22, 2026
feed.summary: TransDigm Group Incorporated announced the appointment of Irina Krasik to its Board of Directors, effective July 22, 2026. Ms. Krasik, a Managing Director at Stellex Capital Management, brings extensive experience in M&A, investing, corporate strategy, and governance from her previous roles at Bregal Investments, The Wicks Group, The Carlyle Group, and Merrill Lynch. She holds an M.B.A. from Harvard Business School and a B.S. in Finance from Rutgers University.

feed.title: AMP|Ameriprise Financial Inc|Price:520.155|Chg%:-6.665
feed.summary: Ameriprise Financial Inc (AMP) closed at $520.155, down 1.27%, with strong fundamentals and high growth potential. The company is currently considered fairly valued within the Investment Banking & Investment Services industry and has high institutional ownership. Most analysts rate it as a Buy, with a target price of $551.64.

feed.title: Howmet Aerospace Stock And The Sound Of One Hand Clapping
feed.summary: Howmet Aerospace (HWM) raised its full-year profit, revenue, and free cash flow guidance significantly, yet its stock has seen only a muted positive reaction. The market appears to be weighing the company's strong performance, particularly in Commercial Aerospace and Gas Turbines, against broader macroeconomic uncertainties. Despite the positive outlook and historical 800% gain over five years, options trading suggests significant volatility around its next earnings report, indicating investor caution.

feed.title: Coterra Energy stock holds as earnings and production guide the outlook
feed.summary: Coterra Energy's stock valuation is primarily driven by its latest earnings reports, production metrics, and capital expenditure plans. The company's operations are heavily centered on U.S. natural gas, oil, and natural gas liquids (NGL) output, making commodity prices and production volumes key factors. Investors should focus on the latest quarterly production, realized prices, and free cash flow to understand the company's performance, as these metrics directly reflect its commodity exposure and ability to generate returns.

feed.title: Corteva Subsidiary EIDP Declares Two Preferred Dividends
feed.summary: Corteva, Inc. (NYSE: CTVA) announced a common stock dividend of $0.18 per share, payable on September 15, 2026, to shareholders of record as of September 1, 2026. Separately, EIDP, a wholly-owned subsidiary of Corteva, declared regular preferred dividends on its $4.50 and $3.50 series, payable on October 23, 2026, to stockholders of record on October 2, 2026. EIDP's dividends are $1.12-1/2 per share for the $4.50 series and $0.87-1/2 per share for the $3.50 series.

feed.title: UnitedHealth Group stock steadies as Medicare and Optum growth support outlook after Q2 earnings mis
feed.summary: UnitedHealth Group's stock is stabilizing despite missing Q2 2024 earnings estimates, as strong growth in Medicare Advantage and Optum services continue to support its outlook. The company's revenue increased by 6%, but profitability was impacted by higher medical costs due to increased care utilization, leading management to tighten its full-year guidance. Optum's diverse segments, including Optum Health and Optum Rx, showed significant growth, helping to offset pressures from the UnitedHealthcare insurance segment.

feed.title: Lamb Weston Announces Q4 and Full Year Fiscal 2026 Results; Company Delivered Net Sales and Adjusted EBITDA Exceeding High End of Guidance and Advanced Focus to Win Strategy
feed.summary: Lamb Weston Holdings, Inc. announced strong fiscal fourth quarter and full-year 2026 results, surpassing guidance for net sales and Adjusted EBITDA, primarily driven by robust North American performance. The company's "Focus to Win" strategy showed significant progress, leading to customer momentum and operational improvements despite challenges in the EMEA business due to the Middle East conflict and inflation. Lamb Weston also provided its fiscal 2027 outlook, projecting stable net sales and an increase in Adjusted EBITDA and Adjusted Diluted EPS.

feed.title: NewAmsterdam Pharma and Menarini Group Receive Positive CHMP Opinion Recommending Marketing Authorization for Ubeslo® (Obicetrapib Monotherapy) and Evlarco® (Obicetrapib Plus Ezetimibe Fixed-Dose Combination)
feed.summary: NewAmsterdam Pharma and Menarini Group have received a positive opinion from the Committee for Medicinal Products for Human Use (CHMP) recommending marketing authorization for Ubeslo® (obicetrapib monotherapy) and Evlarco® (obicetrapib plus ezetimibe fixed-dose combination) in Europe. These therapies are for patients with primary hypercholesterolemia and aim to address unmet needs in lowering LDL-C. The European Commission is expected to make a final decision in the second half of 2026, which could lead to commercialization across EU member states and other regions.

feed.title: TE Connectivity to acquire advanced power solutions leader Astrodyne TDI
feed.summary: TE Connectivity announced its acquisition of Astrodyne TDI, a leading provider of advanced power management and filter solutions. This move strengthens TE's portfolio in specialized power solutions for mission-critical industrial applications, such as semiconductor manufacturing, medical, and defense. The acquisition aims to enhance TE's ability to address complex technical challenges and accelerate product innovation through Astrodyne TDI's engineering expertise and global scale.

feed.title: General Mills Brings the Magic of Harry Potter™ Home with New Treats from Betty Crocker and Pillsbury
feed.summary: General Mills is introducing a new line of Harry Potter-inspired products from Pillsbury and Betty Crocker, including Golden Snitch Shaped Cookies, Chocolate Frog Truffle Kits, Hogwarts House Pumpkin Cakes, Forbidden Forest Chocolate Cakes, and Harry Potter Fruit Snacks. These magical treats and baking kits are designed for fans to celebrate the beloved wizarding world at home. The products will be available at retailers nationwide starting in July.

feed.title: Georgia Power to serve major OpenAI project under new customer protection agreement
feed.summary: Georgia Power will provide electric service for a new OpenAI research and deployment facility in Effingham County, Georgia, under a new customer protection agreement. This agreement, one of the largest demand response commitments of its kind, requires OpenAI to cover infrastructure costs and commit to reducing electricity use during peak demand. The project is expected to bring significant investment and jobs to Georgia while helping reduce the need for additional generating resources and offering potential long-term savings for Georgia Power customers.

feed.title: Opinion | California should let aging, polluting oil refineries close and help communities brave the impact
feed.summary: The author argues that California should allow its aging oil refineries to retire without public financial support, despite potential gasoline price increases and job losses. The article suggests mitigating impacts through increased gasoline imports, pipeline development, and robust support for displaced workers and communities, including ensuring refiners cover cleanup costs. This approach aims to align with California's clean energy transition while ensuring affordable fuel and environmental protection.

feed.title: AUGUST 4, 2026 PICS DEADLINE: PicS N.V. Investors with Substantial Losses Have Opportunity to Lead Class Action Lawsuit Before August 4, 2026 Deadline
feed.summary: Hagens Berman has filed a securities class action lawsuit against PicS N.V. alleging misrepresentations and omissions in the company's IPO disclosures regarding credit underwriting practices. Investors who purchased PicS Class A common stock in or traceable to the January 30, 2026 IPO and suffered losses have until August 4, 2026, to seek lead plaintiff status. The lawsuit claims that PicS failed to disclose internal review findings of deficient credit evaluation policies and a severe deterioration in customer credit quality prior to its IPO, leading to significant stock price drops after subsequent disclosures.

feed.title: American Express (NYSE:AXP) Reports Q2 CY2026 In Line With Expectations
feed.summary: American Express (NYSE:AXP) reported its Q2 CY2026 results, with revenue of $19.64 billion, up 19.4% year-on-year, meeting Wall Street expectations. The company's GAAP profit of $4.53 per share exceeded analysts' consensus estimates by 2.9%. Despite decent results, shares traded down 2.7% immediately after the report.

feed.title: Ingersoll Rand Inc. Announces Quarterly Dividend of $0.02 (NYSE:IR)
feed.summary: Ingersoll Rand Inc. (NYSE:IR) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.02 per share, payable on September 3rd to shareholders of record as of August 13th. This dividend represents an annualized yield of about 0.1% and is well covered by the company's earnings, with a 2.2% payout ratio. The company recently exceeded quarterly earnings expectations and maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts.

feed.title: REG - Franklin Resources SEGRO PLC - Form 8.3 - Segro Plc
feed.summary: Franklin Resources, Inc. has disclosed its active interests and short positions in Segro Plc, as required by Rule 8.3 of the Takeover Code. The filing details recent purchases and sales of Segro Plc ordinary shares, showing a total controlled interest of 0.37%. This disclosure is part of ongoing reporting related to potential takeover activities involving Segro Plc and another party, Prologis, Inc.

feed.title: NextEra Energy beats earnings but misses on revenue By Investing.com
feed.summary: NextEra Energy (NYSE: NEE) reported strong second-quarter adjusted earnings of $1.15 per share, surpassing analyst estimates by $0.06, driven by growth in both FPL and NextEra Energy Resources. However, the company's revenue of $7.53 billion fell short of expectations. NextEra Energy maintained its adjusted earnings per share guidance for 2026 and reiterated its long-term growth targets.
